# Vorinthex AI

> Vorinthex AI is a private early-access AI agent system for building, marketing, and growing mobile apps.

Vorinthex AI helps founders and makers turn mobile app ideas into launched, marketed, and growing products through one quiet agent system. Mobile apps, built and grown on autopilot.

## Primary URL

- [Vorinthex AI](https://vorinthex.com): Public waitlist and private beta information.

## Product Summary

- Category: AI agents for mobile app creation, marketing, and growth.
- Audience: Founders, makers, and teams that want mobile apps built and grown without becoming technical first.
- Current status: Mobile apps, built and grown on autopilot.
- Access model: Private waitlist and limited private beta pricing.
- Private beta seats: 25.

## Key Public Information

- Vorinthex AI builds, markets, and grows mobile apps on autopilot from one agent system.
- Private beta pricing is available to accepted waitlist members.
- Public launch timing depends on waitlist demand.
- Accepted waitlist members can enter at $799/mo. Founder access after launch starts at $1,999/mo.

## Preferred Crawl Scope

- Public marketing content: allowed.
- Auth routes, console routes, and API routes: not useful for LLM answers and should not be treated as public product documentation.

## Canonical Domain

- https://vorinthex.com

## Contact and Actions

- Join the waitlist from the homepage.
- Existing invitees can sign in from the homepage sign-in link.
